_comment: KMD2 input schema for generate_kmd.py. Real e-MTA element names (NOT Line1_1…Line13). declaration_body values are taxable BASES by rate, EXCEPT inputVatTotal/importVat/fixedAssetsVat/carsVat which are VAT amounts. e-MTA computes total VAT (line 4), VAT due (line 12) and overpaid (line 13) itself — do not supply them (no such element/column exists). Output: a KMD2 machine CSV (primary) + XSD-validated vatDeclaration XML (secondary). All monetary values are EUR decimals with a dot.
_comment_declaration_body: KMD main form (declarationBody). Omit or set 0 for lines that do not apply. Rate lines feed e-MTA's line-4 computation. Reverse charge is a BASE only: EU suppliers -> euAcquisitionsGoodsAndServicesTotal (line 6); non-EU services + domestic reverse charge -> acquisitionOtherGoodsAndServicesTotal (line 7). For a full-deduction taxpayer do NOT gross reverse-charge VAT into inputVatTotal (line 5); if input_vat_full_deduction is false, handle the non-deductible reverse-charge output via adjustmentsPlus (line 10).
_comment_sales_annex: KMD INF A (salesAnnex): sales partners where invoices to that partner total > EUR 1,000 in the period. Omit the whole key when no partner reaches the threshold — output then sets noSales=true and omits the annex. sum_per_partner=false is detailed per-invoice (invoiceNumber + invoiceDate as YYYY-MM-DD, rendered DD.MM.YYYY in the CSV); true summarises per partner. taxRate is the classifier value (e.g. '24', '24erikord').
_comment_purchases_annex: KMD INF B (purchasesAnnex): purchase partners where invoices from that partner total > EUR 1,000 (incl. VAT). invoiceSumVat = total incl. VAT; vatInPeriod = input VAT declared on line 5 for that partner this period. Omit the key when no partner reaches the threshold.
